intent.raw: Continue Task Sessions until a real blocker, with the form ready and remaining work defined.
intent.objective: Create versioned local fixtures and prove the existing simulator matches them, then stop honestly at any human access or comprehension evidence gate.
intent.operator_sentence: Make tomorrow's demo reproducible without inventing safety evidence.

steps.name: Build strict fixture context
stop_conditions: Any fixture obligation lacks evidence or exceeds the fixture/test write scope.

steps.name: Author versioned fixtures and local runner
stop_conditions: A change would modify form source or enable collection, storage, cryptography, publication, or token effects.

steps.name: Validate machine fixtures
stop_conditions: Any machine fixture diverges after bounded repair.

steps.name: Apply access and comprehension gate
stop_conditions: Required screen-reader, native IME, or participant retell evidence is absent or any critical consequence is misunderstood.

gates.condition: All nine fixture obligations and exact write scope are covered.
The active Goal explicitly authorizes the next ready SWU.
The local browser runner passes every version-1 fixture without post-load requests or stored state.

gates.owner: future test participants and access-mode operators
gates.condition: The manual access matrix runs and every participant correctly retells every critical consequence.
This dispatch does not publish or deploy.

state_namespaces.namespace: invented fixture and browser test state
state_namespaces.write_policy: Local test files and volatile browser state only.

promotion_splits.rule: Automated DOM evidence cannot replace screen-reader, native IME, or participant retell evidence.

promotion_guardrails: Fixture parity proves only the local non-collecting simulator contract.
No automated result may be described as human comprehension, assistive-technology parity, privacy, security, cryptography, live readiness, or launch approval.
